tool.name: PGGB
tool.description: build a pangenome variation graph (wfmash + seqwish + smoothxg + gfaffix + odgi)

param.label: Input multi-FASTA (PanSN-renamed)
param.help: A single FASTA (typically bgzipped) of all haplotypes, with PanSN-spec headers (SAMPLE#HAP#CONTIG). Concatenate per-strain assemblies first via fasta-merge.

param.label: Number of haplotypes (-n)
param.help: Total haplotypes in the input. For the 8-strain Pv panel: 8.

param.label: wfmash segment length (-s)
param.help: Minimum mapping seed length. 5000 for ~25 Mb apicomplexan-scale genomes.

param.label: Mapping identity % (-p)
param.help: 90 intra-species, 70-80 inter-species. Use 90 for the Pv panel.

param.label: seqwish min match length (-k)
param.help: 23 is the pggb default. Lower = finer graph; higher = more local collapsing.

param.label: Mappings per segment (-c)
param.help: Number of mappings retained per segment in wfmash. Defaults to 1; raise for highly diverse panels.

param.label: PanSN exclude-delimiter (-Y)
param.help: Skip mappings where query and target share a prefix before this delimiter. Must match the delimiter used in PanSN-renamed headers.

param.label: POA target lengths (-G)
param.help: Comma-separated POA target lengths; smoothxg iterates once per length. pggb 0.7 default: 700,1100.

param.label: POA score parameters (-P)
param.help: match,mismatch,gap1,ext1,gap2,ext2 OR a preset (asm5,asm10,asm15,asm20). Default is asm20 = 1,4,6,2,26,1.

param.label: POA padding ratio (-O, blank = pggb default 0.001)
param.help: Flanking sequence length as fraction of average sequence length per block. v2 native build used 0.03.

param.label: Skip 1D/2D viz (-v)
param.help: Suppresses layout PNG and viz outputs. Speeds up small test runs.

param.label: VCF spec (-V, blank = off)
param.help: Reference path prefix(es) for vg deconstruct, e.g. 'GCA_900093555.2' for the Pv PvP01 reference. Multiple comma-separated. Set blank to skip.

tool.help:
**PGGB** — PanGenome Graph Builder.
Builds a variation graph from a PanSN-renamed multi-FASTA via the standard pangenome pipeline:
wfmash (mapping) -> seqwish (graph induction) -> smoothxg (POA smoothing) -> gfaffix (affix collapse) -> odgi (final binary graph)
This wrapper invokes the upstream `pggb` orchestrator binary as-is, preserving its internal smoothxg-iteration loop. The wrapper exposes the most commonly tuned parameters; full advanced control is available by running the underlying tools (`wfmash`, `seqwish`, `smoothxg`, `gfaffix`, `odgi`) directly.
-----
**Inputs**
- `Input multi-FASTA` — a *single* file (typically bgzipped) containing all haplotypes. Headers MUST follow PanSN-spec: `SAMPLE#HAP#CONTIG`. Use the `PanSN rename` tool on each strain's FASTA, then concatenate with `fasta-merge` and bgzip. - `Number of haplotypes` — total haplotype count; e.g. 8 for an 8-strain haploid panel.
**Key parameters**
- `--segment-length` (`-s`): wfmash seed (default 5000 for ~25 Mb genomes). - `--map-pct-id` (`-p`): identity threshold (90 intra-species; 70-80 inter-species). - `--min-match-len` (`-k`): seqwish minimum match length (default 23). - `--exclude-delim` (`-Y`): PanSN delimiter; must match input headers. - `--vcf-spec` (`-V`): set to a reference accession prefix to emit a per-strain VCF via `vg deconstruct`.
**Outputs**
- Smoothed GFA1 (gzipped). - odgi binary graph (.og). - 2D layout (.og.lay) and layout/viz PNGs (unless `--skip-viz`). - Run log. - (Optional) deconstruct VCF if `--vcf-spec` is set.
-----
**Resource notes**
`pggb` is the heavy step in the pipeline. For 8 x ~25 Mb haploid genomes expect 3-6 h wall on a 32-core box; peak memory ~20 GB. The wrapper tags OOM-style failures so Galaxy admins can auto-resubmit to a larger runner.
